items: New: Recession probability overlay on SLOOS chart — see how yield curve signals align with bank lending tightening in real time
New: Credit loss leading indicator — Card delinquency (90+ DPD) now visible alongside tightening and recession risk for a complete risk picture

Improved: Oil price chart rescaled for clearer trend visibility
Improved: Credit chart visual consistency across panels
